prompt:
STYLE LOCK: Period gothic live-action, mid-19th-century interiors; candlelight and deep shadows; desaturated cool-gray palette; naturalistic skin and fabric texture; no illustration or stylized animation

CHARACTER VARIABLES (use these identities consistently; do not redesign faces or wardrobe):
- Character_The_Narrator [The Narrator]: Lean man of middle years (about 40–50), pale sallow skin, hollow cheeks, dark disordered medium-length hair, bright intense dark eyes, thin tense mouth; plain dark wool waistcoat over white shirtsleeves, dark trousers; period clothing. Visual lock: Same lean pale face, dark disordered hair, and bright intense dark eyes in every scene; always plain dark waistcoat and shirtsleeves as default; never elderly, never white-haired, never the filmed blue eye. Voice: Male, middle years; medium-high tense pitch; precise, controlled pace that sharpens into fevered urgency; intimate confessional energy, same voice on-camera and in V.O.

CAST COUNT: exactly 1 distinct on-screen character identity(ies) only — Character_The_Narrator. Do not invent extra people, duplicate faces, or crowd extras not listed.

AUDIO: REQUIRED native Grok off-camera voiceover. Character_The_Narrator narrates exactly: "old house, so strange a noise as this excited me to uncontrollable terror.". Start speaking immediately with "old" — do not skip, delay, or swallow the opening word. After the last word, hold a brief natural pause with a closed mouth (about half a second); do not freeze mid-syllable or trail into empty staring. Do not lip-sync on-screen cast to this VO. Ambient bed: louder heartbeat. VOICE LOCK Character_The_Narrator: Male, middle years; medium-high tense pitch; precise, controlled pace that sharpens into fevered urgency; intimate confessional energy, same voice on-camera and in V.O.

PREVIOUS CLIP (already provided as video input — continue from its last frame):
INT. OLD MAN'S BEDCHAMBER - NIGHT. Louder. THE NARRATOR's free hand trembles, then stills. OFF-CAMERA VOICEOVER Character_The_Narrator says "And now at the dead hour of the night, amid the dreadful silence of that". Character_The_Narrator still wears loose dark nightshirt, barefoot, holding lantern Camera directive: Medium shot of Narrator rigid in the dead hour, dreadful house silence broken only by the strange noise. Performance: Acting intensity 9/10: Darting night-terror eyes, pale drawn face, mouth tight on hysteria Optics: f/2.0 shallow depth of field, night dread Color grading: Kodak Vision3 500T 5219, crushed charcoal shadows, cold blue-black tones, single sickly amber lantern ray

Natural progressive motion only — do not invent a new establishing shot or redesign faces/outfits. IDENTITY: Match locked plate descriptions in CHARACTER VARIABLES exactly — do not drift to illustration, anime, cartoon, or a different face/wardrobe. On-screen: Character_The_Narrator.

THIS CLIP:
End cleanly when the spoken line and primary action finish — do not hold a frozen pose or empty silence after dialogue.

Character_The_Narrator still wears loose dark nightshirt, barefoot, holding lantern Camera directive: Close-up capturing uncontrollable terror creeping into Narrator’s eyes amid the old house silence.
